How WriFe works
📚

67 structured lessons

From personal stories to genre writing — a complete curriculum that builds on itself, lesson by lesson.

🔗

Daily PWP chain practice

30 sentences every day. Pupils build vocabulary and sentence patterns through structured daily chains.

🤖

AI writing coach

Instant feedback on vocabulary, structure, and craft — personalised for each pupil, without replacing the teacher.

⭐

Gamified progress

XP, streaks, badges, boss battles. Pupils earn their way through 6 epic writing worlds.

Simple, Affordable Pricing
Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Everything You Need to Teach Writing
WriFe combines proven teaching methods with modern technology to make writing education effective and enjoyable.
📚
67 Progressive Lessons
A carefully structured curriculum that builds skills step-by-step, from personal narratives to published compositions.
🤖
AI-Powered Feedback
Instant, personalised feedback helps pupils understand their strengths and areas for improvement.
📊
Teacher Dashboard
Track class progress, assign lessons, and review pupil work all in one place.
🎮
Interactive Practice
Engaging activities and worksheets keep pupils motivated and practising their writing skills.
📈
Progress Tracking
Visual progress reports help teachers and pupils celebrate achievements and identify growth areas.
👥
Class Management
Easy-to-use tools for managing classes, adding pupils, and assigning lessons with class codes.

Set up your class in 60 seconds

Invite pupils, assign lessons, track progress — all from one dashboard.
